children.label: A
children.text: covered major parts that manufacturers install in passenger motor vehicles in lines designated under as high theft lines; andsection 33104 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: major replacement parts for the major parts described in clause (A) of this paragraph.

children.label: A
children.text: major parts that manufacturers install in passenger motor vehicles having a model year designation later than the calendar year in which the standard takes effect; and

children.label: B
children.text: major replacement parts manufactured after the standard takes effect.

children.heading: .—Standard Requirements
children.label: b .—Standard Requirements
children.text: The standard shall be practicable and provide relevant objective criteria.

children.heading: .—Limitations on Major Part and Replacement Part Standards
children.label: c .—Limitations on Major Part and Replacement Part Standards

children.text: For a major part installed by the manufacturer of the motor vehicle, the standard may not require a part to have more than one identification.

children.label: A
children.text: identification of a part not designed as a replacement for a major part required to be identified under the standard; or

children.label: B
children.text: the inscribing or affixing of identification except a symbol identifying the manufacturer and a common symbol identifying the part as a major replacement part.

children.heading: .—Records and Reports
children.label: d .—Records and Reports
children.text: This chapter does not authorize the Secretary to require a person to keep records or make reports, except as provided in sections 33104(c), 33106(c), 33108(a), and 33112 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
